title: Free Friday Evenings: Contemporary Photography
location: Museum of Modern Art, 11 W 53rd St, New York, NY
description: A free Friday-evening walkthrough of contemporary photography from the museum's collection, with curator-led commentary.

title: SummerStage: Jazz in the Park
location: Central Park SummerStage, New York, NY
description: An open-air evening of live jazz in Central Park, part of the free SummerStage concert series.

title: Sunset Stroll & Volunteer Planting Day
location: The High Line, New York, NY
description: A morning volunteer planting session followed by a guided sunset stroll along the elevated park's gardens.

title: Late Night Jazz Set
location: The Village Vanguard, 178 7th Ave S, New York, NY
description: An intimate late-night jazz set at the historic Greenwich Village club, small room and close seating.

title: Brooklyn Botanic Garden: Golden Hour Tour
location: Brooklyn Botanic Garden, 990 Washington Ave, Brooklyn, NY
description: A guided golden-hour walking tour through the botanic garden's seasonal collections and quiet paths.
